title: juriscan-segmenter output
description: Result of the juriscan-segmenter subagent: full segmentation of a raw extracted text into legal pieces (peças processuais). Char offsets are end-exclusive into raw_text. Coverage of the raw text must be total and non-overlapping — scripts/persist_chunks.py verifies that post-hoc.

raw_text_length.description: Length in characters of the raw text that was segmented. persist_chunks.py cross-checks this against len(raw_text.txt) to detect stale inputs.

notes.description: Optional free-form notes (e.g. 'detected 2 page headers that were preserved as DESCONHECIDO chunks').

id.description: Sequential id c00, c01, ... used for downstream references.

start_char.description: Inclusive start offset into raw_text (characters, not bytes).

tipo_provavel.description: Legal piece type from references/piece_type_taxonomy.json, uppercase. Use 'DESCONHECIDO' when uncertain — downstream will handle it.

confianca.description: Calibrated confidence: 0.9+ = piece header/footer clearly identified; 0.5-0.9 = inferred from content; <0.5 = last-resort guess.

page_range.description: Optional [first_page, last_page] covered by this chunk when page_map is available.

evidencia.description: Short literal snippet (≤120 chars) from the raw text that motivated the classification. Enables auditing and retry-with-feedback.
